name: Mamba Block
description: Selective State Space Model block — linear-time sequence modeling with input-dependent dynamics
code:
# === Mamba Block {{_id}} ===
_mb{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_mb{{_id}}_n = {{state_dim}}
_mb{{_id}}_e = {{expand}}
_mb{{_id}}_inner = _mb{{_id}}_d * _mb{{_id}}_e
_mb{{_id}}_ck = {{conv_kernel}}
_mb{{_id}}_bs, _mb{{_id}}_sl, _ = {{input}}.shape
#
# -- Norm --
_mb{{_id}}_nw = np.ones(_mb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_mb{{_id}}_xn = {{input}} * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean({{input}} ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + 1e-6)) * _mb{{_id}}_nw
#
# -- Input projection (2x inner for gating) --
_mb{{_id}}_w_in = np.random.randn(2 * _mb{{_id}}_inner, _mb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mb{{_id}}_proj = np.matmul(_mb{{_id}}_xn, _mb{{_id}}_w_in.T)
_mb{{_id}}_x = _mb{{_id}}_proj[:, :, :_mb{{_id}}_inner]
_mb{{_id}}_z = _mb{{_id}}_proj[:, :, _mb{{_id}}_inner:]
#
# -- 1D Convolution --
_mb{{_id}}_cw = np.random.randn(_mb{{_id}}_inner, _mb{{_id}}_ck).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mb{{_id}}_xp = np.pad(_mb{{_id}}_x, ((0,0),(_mb{{_id}}_ck-1,0),(0,0)), mode='constant')
_mb{{_id}}_conv = np.zeros_like(_mb{{_id}}_x)
for _mb{{_id}}_t in range(_mb{{_id}}_sl):
    _mb{{_id}}_conv[:, _mb{{_id}}_t, :] = np.sum(_mb{{_id}}_xp[:, _mb{{_id}}_t:_mb{{_id}}_t+_mb{{_id}}_ck, :] * _mb{{_id}}_cw.T[None, :, :], axis=1)
_mb{{_id}}_x = _mb{{_id}}_conv * (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_mb{{_id}}_conv)))  # SiLU
#
# -- Selective SSM --
_mb{{_id}}_w_B = np.random.randn(_mb{{_id}}_n, _mb{{_id}}_inner).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mb{{_id}}_w_C = np.random.randn(_mb{{_id}}_n, _mb{{_id}}_inner).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mb{{_id}}_w_dt = np.random.randn(_mb{{_id}}_inner, _mb{{_id}}_inner).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mb{{_id}}_A = -np.exp(np.random.randn(_mb{{_id}}_inner, _mb{{_id}}_n).astype(np.float32))
_mb{{_id}}_D = np.ones(_mb{{_id}}_inner, dtype=np.float32)
_mb{{_id}}_h = np.zeros((_mb{{_id}}_bs, _mb{{_id}}_inner, _mb{{_id}}_n), dtype=np.float32)
_mb{{_id}}_outs = []
for _mb{{_id}}_t in range(_mb{{_id}}_sl):
    _mb{{_id}}_xt = _mb{{_id}}_x[:, _mb{{_id}}_t, :]
    _mb{{_id}}_B_t = np.matmul(_mb{{_id}}_xt, _mb{{_id}}_w_B.T)
    _mb{{_id}}_C_t = np.matmul(_mb{{_id}}_xt, _mb{{_id}}_w_C.T)
    _mb{{_id}}_dt_t = np.log(1.0 + np.exp(np.matmul(_mb{{_id}}_xt, _mb{{_id}}_w_dt.T)))
    _mb{{_id}}_dA = np.exp(_mb{{_id}}_A[None, :, :] * _mb{{_id}}_dt_t[:, :, None])
    _mb{{_id}}_dB = _mb{{_id}}_dt_t[:, :, None] * _mb{{_id}}_B_t[:, None, :]
    _mb{{_id}}_h = _mb{{_id}}_dA * _mb{{_id}}_h + _mb{{_id}}_dB * _mb{{_id}}_xt[:, :, None]
    _mb{{_id}}_yt = np.sum(_mb{{_id}}_h * _mb{{_id}}_C_t[:, None, :], axis=-1) + _mb{{_id}}_D * _mb{{_id}}_xt
    _mb{{_id}}_outs.append(_mb{{_id}}_yt)
_mb{{_id}}_y = np.stack(_mb{{_id}}_outs, axis=1)
#
# -- Gating --
_mb{{_id}}_gate = _mb{{_id}}_z * (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_mb{{_id}}_z)))  # SiLU
_mb{{_id}}_y = _mb{{_id}}_y * _mb{{_id}}_gate
#
# -- Output projection --
_mb{{_id}}_w_out = np.random.randn(_mb{{_id}}_d, _mb{{_id}}_inner).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mb{{_id}}_ssm_out = np.matmul(_mb{{_id}}_y, _mb{{_id}}_w_out.T)
#
# -- Residual --
{{output}} = {{input}} + _mb{{_id}}_ssm_out
